action.reasoning: Observation: Eval SR=0.596 is current best. 4 envs solved (DistShift, LavaGap, LavaCrossing, DoorKey, UnlockPickup, KeyCorridor, FourRooms). 3 envs at 0%: LockedRoom, Dynamic-Obstacles, MultiRoom-N4-S5. Time: 3.7h left, 21 iters. Analysis: To gain SR I should focus on the 3 failing envs. Dynamic-Obstacles is most tractable - tiny env (8x8), the issue is probably action 6 (done) terminating episodes prematurely. Let me try a focused approach: (a) for Dynamic-Obstacles, use action masking to remove action 6, with much longer training and small ent. (b) for MultiRoom-N4-S5, try with FlatObsWrapper or much longer training. (c) for LockedRoom, similar. Given time constraints, the most reliable bet is to use the FullyObsWrapper checkpoints I already have in checkpoints_full/ — but those got SR=0 too. So they won't help. Let me try a different tack: limit action space to 0-2 for Dynamic-Obstacles (it only needs left/right/forward) - this should massively help. For MultiRoom, similar approach (no pickup/drop needed - just toggle for doors). Let me write a focused training run for Dynamic-Obstacles with action restricted to 3 actions (turn left, right, forward), short episodes, longer training. This should get nontrivial SR. Decision: Train Dynamic-Obstacles with restricted action space (3 actions). If time permits, also retry MultiRoom with restricted actions.
